name: leadpulse-ai
description: LeadPulse AI monorepo: AI campaign generation, Meta paused publishing, CallRail metadata tracking.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @leadpulse/shared && npm run build -w @leadpulse/server && npm run build -w @leadpulse/client
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @leadpulse/shared && npm run typecheck -w @leadpulse/server && npm run typecheck -w @leadpulse/client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @leadpulse/shared && npm run lint -w @leadpulse/server && npm run lint -w @leadpulse/client
